1. On first request of a captcha:

<tr id="captchaFormPart"><td class="desktop">Verification</td><td colspan="2"><div id="t-root" class="" style="border-radius: 4px; position: relative; width: 300px; height: 145px; background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 4px; overflow: hidden; font-family: sans-serif;"><div id="t-ctrl" style="display: flex; padding: 4px;"><button id="t-load" type="button" data-board="g" data-tid="108355732" tabindex="5" disabled="" style="font-size: 11px; box-sizing: border-box; height: 18px; padding: 1px 4px; margin: 0px;">Get Captcha (51)</button><button id="t-next" type="button" disabled="" title="Shortcut: SPACE" style="font-size: 11px; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px 0px 0px auto; padding: 1px 4px; height: 18px;">Next</button></div><div id="t-task" style="width: 100%; height: 80px; display: flex; font-size: 14px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 0px 12px; box-sizing: border-box; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center top; user-select: none; white-space: pre-line;"><div>Please wait a while before making a post or verify your email <a target="_blank" href="https://sys.4chan.org/signin">here</a>.</div></div><input id="t-slider" autocomplete="off" type="range" min="0" disabled="" style="width: 90%; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 8px auto 0px; position: relative; outline: 0px; display: block;"><input name="t-challenge" type="hidden" autocomplete="off"><input id="t-resp" name="t-response" autocomplete="off" type="hidden"></div><div class="passNotice">4chan Pass users can bypass this verification. [<a href="https://www.4chan.org/pass" target="_blank">Learn More</a>] [<a href="https://sys.4chan.org/auth">Login</a>]</div></td></tr>

2. After waiting for the cooldown to finish:

4. After finishing the challenges and submiting if it throws an error:

<table style="text-align: center; width: 100%; height: 300px;"><tbody><tr valign="middle"><td align="center" style="font-size: x-large; font-weight: bold;"><span id="errmsg" style="color: red;">Posting from your IP range has been temporarily blocked due to abuse [<a href="//www.4chan.org/faq#blocked">More Info</a>].<br>Please <a href="https://sys.4chan.org/signin" target="_blank">verify your e-mail address</a> or try again later. </span><br><br>[<a href="https://boards.4chan.org/g/">Return</a>]</td></tr></tbody></table>
